verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He's able, He's able, I know my Lord is able. I know my Lord is able To carry me through. He's able, He's able, I know my Lord is able, I know my Lord is able To carry me through.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He heals the broken hearted And sets the captive free He makes the lame to walk again And causes the blind to see. He's able, He's able, I know my Lord is able, I know my Lord is able To carry me through.
